blocks.text: A song of ascents. Those who trust in the Lord are like Mount Zion that cannot be moved, enduring forever.
Jerusalem, hills enfold it, and the Lord enfolds His people now and forever.
The scepter of the wicked shall never rest upon the land allotted to the righteous, that the righteous not set their hand to wrongdoing.
Do good, O Lord, to the good, to the upright in heart.
But those who in their crookedness act corruptly, let the Lord make them go the way of evildoers. May it be well with Israel!
